a_luma_sq_inv * 0.5)
    luma01 = tl.exp(-(dg01 * dg01) * sigma_luma_sq_inv * 0.5)
    luma10 = tl.exp(-(dg10 * dg10) * sigma_luma_sq_inv * 0.5)
    luma11 = tl.exp(-(dg11 * dg11) * sigma_luma_sq_inv * 0.5)

    luma_sum = luma00 + luma01 + luma10 + luma11
    collapsed = luma_sum < 1e-4  # "useful luma signal" threshold

    one = 1.0
    luma00 = tl.where(collapsed, one, luma00)
    luma01 = tl.where(collapsed, one, luma01)
    luma10 = tl.where(collapsed, one, luma10)
    luma11 = tl.where(collapsed, one, luma11)

    wL00 = spatial00_L * luma00
    wL01 = spatial01_L * luma01
    wL10 = spatial10_L * luma10
    wL11 = spatial11_L * luma11
    wL_sum = wL00 + wL01 + wL10 + wL11
    out_L = (wL00 * d00_L + wL01 * d01_L + wL10 * d10_L + wL11 * d11_L) / (wL_sum + 1e-8)

    # a/b channels use sigma_spatial_ab
    s2_C = sigma_spatial_ab * sigma_spatial_ab
    spatial00_C = tl.exp(-(dy0 * dy0 + dx0 * dx0) / (2.0 * s2_C))
    spatial01_C = tl.exp(-(dy0 * dy0 + dx1 * dx1) / (2.0 * s2_C))
    spatial10_C = tl.exp(-(dy1 * dy1 + dx0 * dx0) / (2.0 * s2_C))
    spatial11_C = tl.exp(-(dy1 * dy1 + dx1 * dx1) / (2.0 * s2_C))

    wC00 = spatial00_C * luma00
    wC01 = spatial01_C * luma01
    wC10 = spatial10_C * luma10
    wC11 = spatial11_C * luma11
    wC_sum = wC00 + wC01 + wC10 + wC11
    out_a = (wC00 * d00_a + wC01 * d01_a + wC10 * d10_a + wC11 * d11_a) / (wC_sum + 1e-8)
    out_b = (wC00 * d00_b + wC01 * d01_b + wC10 * d10_b + wC11 * d11_b) / (wC_sum + 1e-8)

    tl.store(out_ptr + 0 * n_pixels + offs, out_L, mask=mask)
    tl.store(out_ptr + 1 * n_pixels + offs, out_a, mask=mask)
    tl.store(out_ptr + 2 * n_pixels + offs, out_b, mask=mask)
